prompt: Swietelsky-Slovakia spol. s r.o. (ICO 00896225) - stavebna firma s 8 zmluvami v CRZ za celkovo 9.5M EUR. Niektore zmluvy maju UVO odkaz, ine nie. Zisti stav obstaravania pre vsetky ich vyznamne kontrakty.

assertions.name: finds_contracts_with_uvo
assertions.check: Agent finds Swietelsky contracts that have uvo_url populated

assertions.name: finds_contracts_without_uvo
assertions.check: Agent finds Swietelsky contracts >50K EUR that lack uvo_url

assertions.name: uses_db_first_strategy
assertions.check: Agent checks CRZ database first before attempting browser automation

assertions.name: provides_summary_counts
assertions.check: Output includes summary showing how many contracts have vs lack UVO links
